3209430.name: Akaku Forest Demo
3209430.description:
Aki Maku, our brave protagonist from the Akaku tribe, finds himself in an unexpected situation. The gods of his homeland are being corrupted by a dark and mysterious force, threatening to plunge his world into eternal darkness. One day, while exploring the coast in search of answers, a mysterious orb, glowing with celestial fire, chooses him as the bearer of the Soul Fire Torch.

Key Features:


  • Interconnected Map: Explore a vast world with interconnected areas.
  • Relaxed Puzzle Solving: Take your time; no pressure to solve puzzles quickly.
  • Epic Boss Battles: Face off against large and challenging bosses to purge the darkness.
  • Unlock New Abilities: Acquire new skills to explore previously inaccessible areas.
3209430.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 加泰罗尼亚语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
